message:
feat(mvcc): cache-line alignment to prevent false sharing across lock shards

Introduce CacheAligned<T> wrapper type (new cache_aligned.rs module) that
ensures inner values are aligned to 64-byte cache-line boundaries. Apply it
to InProcessPageLockTable and CommitIndex shard arrays so that concurrent
threads operating on different shards never contend on the same cache line.

Key changes:
- New crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/cache_aligned.rs with CacheAligned<T>,
  CACHE_LINE_BYTES constant, and SharedTxnSlot type alias
- Wrap lock table and commit index shards in CacheAligned<T> in core_types.rs
- Add tests verifying 64-byte address separation between adjacent shards
- Re-export CacheAligned, CACHE_LINE_BYTES, SharedTxnSlot from mvcc lib.rs
- Add xxhash-rust dependency to both mvcc and pager crates for fast hashing

This addresses spec section 1.5 requirements for eliminating false sharing
in the MVCC concurrency layer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
